welcome: Hello! How can I help you today?
escalated: Your request has been flagged for a human agent. Please wait.
already_escalated: Your conversation is already being handled by a human agent.
no_group: Support is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
ai_toggled_on: AI replies enabled for this conversation.
ai_toggled_off: AI replies disabled for this conversation.
ai_unavailable: Our assistant is temporarily unavailable. A support agent will reply shortly.
error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
error_message_failed: Failed to send your message. Please try again.
